def positive_logger_error_inside_except_without_exc_info():
    rule_id = "logger_error_inside_except_without_exc_info"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "logger.error or logger.critical called inside an except block without exc_info=True, discarding the stack trace."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
